/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc -fPIC  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g -O0  -shared -Wl,-soname,libplugin-c1_2verr.so -o ../libplugin-c1_2verr.so CMakeFiles/plugin-c1_2verr.dir/c1_2_v_err.c.o   -L/home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/workspace/build-docker-opcua-e2e ../../../libneuron-base.so /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libssl.a /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lpthread -lm -lprotobuf-c -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
